title: Cryptocurrency Collective Token
description: Cryptocurrency collective token on BSC with reflection rewards, BNB redistribution, an ABC referral system, LP acquisition mechanics, and presale/community engagement flows.
impact: Built token mechanics and supporting web flows for a BSC cryptocurrency project, including holder rewards, transfer redistribution, referral incentives, liquidity acquisition, and presale engagement.
responsibilities: Developed Solidity smart contracts for a cryptocurrency token on Binance Smart Chain.
Implemented static reflection rewards for token holders.
Built BNB redistribution logic on transfers.
Implemented an ABC referral system with multi-level reward mechanics.
Added LP acquisition mechanisms and reduced referral sell tax behavior.
Built a WordPress site for presale participation and community engagement.
achievements: Delivered core tokenomics for a BSC-based collective cryptocurrency token.
Implemented reward mechanics across holder reflections, BNB redistribution, and referral incentives.
Supported presale and community growth through smart-contract and web platform delivery.
